question: Pizza vs. fried chicken — if you could only eat one for life, which would you pick?
Summer or winter — if you had to live in one season forever?
Morning person or night owl — if you had to be one for life?
Coffee or tea — if you could only drink one forever?
Texting or phone calls — if only one way of communicating remained?
Sauced fried chicken or plain fried chicken — if you had to pick just one?
Movie theaters or streaming at home — if you could only choose one forever?
Black bean noodles or spicy seafood noodle soup — if you had to eat only one forever?
Stairs or escalators — if you had to use only one for life?
Bus or subway — if you could only take one form of public transit?
Pork belly or beef — if you could only eat one meat forever?
Delivery or dining out — if you had to pick just one?
Music or podcasts — if you could only listen to one while commuting?
Instagram or YouTube — if only one survived?
Naps or late-night snacks — if you could only enjoy one?
Bread or rice — if you could only eat one carb forever?
Indoors or outdoors — if you always had to eat in one setting?
Cat or dog — if you could only have one as a pet?
Working out or walking — if that was the only physical activity you could do for life?
Domestic travel or international travel — if you could only do one?
Sweet snacks or savory snacks — if you could only have one flavor?
Earphones or speakers — if you could only listen to music one way?
Shower or bath — if you had to stick with one forever?
Books or YouTube — if you could only get information one way?
Ice cream or cake — if you could only have one dessert forever?
Café or home — if you had to always work or study in one place?
Text messages or voice memos — if you could only send messages one way?
Movies or TV series — if you could only watch one type of content?
Cooking yourself or ordering delivery — if you had to eat every meal one way?
Sneakers or dress shoes — if you could only wear one type of footwear?
Convenience store or supermarket — if you had to shop at only one forever?
Cold noodles or ramen noodles — if you could only eat one type of noodle dish?
Quiet café or loud, buzzing café — if you had to always pick one?
Always plan your trips vs. always go spontaneously — if you had to commit to one style?
Hot and sunny weather vs. cool and overcast — if that was your forever climate?
Sweet-salty-sweet-salty vs. light and clean flavors — if your food preferences were fixed?
Sleep early and wake early vs. sleep late and wake late — if that was your permanent schedule?
Go out on weekends vs. stay home — if you had to rest only one way forever?
Always try new menu items vs. always order your usual — if you had to commit to one?
Smartphone or laptop — if you could only use one device?
Rich but lonely vs. poor but surrounded by love?
A life where you remember everything vs. a life where you forget all bad memories?
Doing what you love but struggling financially vs. hating your work but living comfortably?
Succeeding ten years early but dying young vs. living an ordinary but long life?
A world where only you tell the truth vs. a world where everyone lies?
A life where everyone likes you vs. a life where just one person truly loves you?
Achieving your dream but losing your family vs. giving up your dream to keep your family?
Knowing the past but not the future vs. knowing the future but forgetting the past?
World-famous but no one truly knows you vs. unknown to the world but deeply loved?
Ten short moments of happiness vs. one perfect moment of happiness?
Perfect health but no money vs. lots of money but always sick?
Decent at everything but no standout talent vs. one thing you're absolutely exceptional at?
Someone you love forgetting you vs. you forgetting someone you love?
Losing your best friend to succeed vs. losing your success to keep your best friend?
Loving only one person your whole life vs. loving many people but never deeply?
A life where you can read everyone's thoughts but your thoughts are exposed to all vs. knowing nothing but keeping your own secrets?
Only excelling at what you love vs. being great at everything even if you hate it?
Remembered but unhappy vs. forgotten but happy?
Perfect health until death vs. a short life where every dream comes true?
Loved but not respected vs. respected but not loved?
Losing what you have now for a chance at something greater vs. keeping what you have but stagnating?
No time to yourself but never lonely vs. always alone but completely free?
A life where you admit when you're wrong vs. always believing you're right?
Working hard and failing vs. succeeding without any effort?
Taking a brave leap and regretting it vs. never leaping and regretting that?
A life shaped by others' expectations vs. a life lived by your own standards?
Knowing all the truth but getting hurt vs. living happily inside a beautiful lie?
Loving one thing completely vs. loving many things a little?
Getting everything you want through a painful journey vs. enjoying the journey but arriving at nothing?
Living without ever fully forgiving someone vs. never being fully forgiven by someone?
Taking on the pain of someone you love vs. having someone you love take on your pain?
Enjoying the present but worrying about the future vs. sacrificing the present for the future?
Making every decision alone vs. always having someone else decide for you?
Genius but lazy vs. ordinary but endlessly hardworking?
Carrying all your bad memories and growing from them vs. erasing them and living light?
A life where everyone knows everything about you vs. a life where no one knows you at all?
Happy now but full of regret later vs. hard now but deeply rewarding later?
Losing love to gain freedom vs. losing freedom to gain love?
Greatest success but completely unrecognized vs. ordinary life but celebrated by all?
One big mistake vs. dozens of small ones — which would you rather have?
A life where you make a honking sound every time you walk vs. a life where every laugh sounds like a fart?
Feet that smell like chocolate vs. breath that smells like garlic — forever?
Hair made of noodles vs. fingernails made of chopsticks?
A life where you can only speak in song vs. a life where you have to rap everything you say?
Every time you blink a selfie gets taken vs. every time you sneeze fireworks go off?
Your body is invisible but your clothes are visible vs. your clothes are invisible but your body is visible?
A child's voice forever vs. an old man's voice forever?
Ten hands vs. ten feet?
You talk in a different language in your sleep every night vs. you forget your own name every time you wake up?
You make a rooster sound when you're hungry vs. you sing like a songbird when you're full?
A thought bubble appears above your head whenever you think vs. your mood shows up on your face like the weather?
Background music plays everywhere you walk vs. lighting changes every time your mood shifts?
You have to narrate every bite of food you eat vs. subtitles appear in the air whenever you speak?
Your height changes by 1cm every day vs. your weight changes by 1kg every day?
An elephant's nose vs. rabbit ears?
A fanfare plays every time you use the bathroom vs. you burp with a car horn sound?
You can see smells as colors vs. you can taste sounds?
Wear slippers every single day forever vs. wear formal business attire every single day forever?
Your name changes every month vs. your face shifts slightly every month?
You always react one beat too late vs. you laugh at things before they even happen?
You can only walk backwards vs. you can only sit sideways?
Someone chews your food for you every time you eat vs. you hear your own thoughts in someone else's voice?
Your eyes always close in every photo vs. your tongue always sticks out in every photo?
You can hear the history of every object you touch vs. you can hear the latest worry of every person you touch?
You always speak at 2x speed vs. you always move at 0.5x speed?
Your dreams are live-streamed vs. you blurt out your dreams out loud as soon as you wake up?
Everything around you is made of LEGOs vs. everything around you is made of stickers?
You float upward every time you laugh vs. you get stuck to the floor every time you cry?
The food you eat shows up as your hair color vs. the music you listen to shows up as your eye color?
You shrink when you're sleepy vs. you double in size when you're excited?
Every phone call sounds like a cat meowing to the person you're calling vs. every greeting you make comes out in a robot voice?
Feet made of magnets vs. hands covered in velcro?
A year of your memories disappears on every birthday vs. you get one year younger every year?
You must dance once a day every day vs. you must sing once a day every day?
Telescope eyes vs. radar ears?
You can only fall asleep inside a refrigerator vs. you can only shower inside a washing machine?
All food tastes exactly the same vs. the same food tastes different every time you eat it?
Your memories from the day before get shuffled every morning vs. you dream about a random stranger's life every night?
You cry when something is funny and laugh when something is sad vs. you sneeze when you're happy and hiccup when you're angry?
Your shadow refuses to follow your movements vs. your reflection does the opposite of what you do?
A life where you can only tell the truth vs. a life where you can lie freely?
Losing your memories vs. losing your emotions?
Loved but not understood vs. understood but not loved?
A long but dull life vs. a short but intensely lived life?
Doing everything on your own vs. always needing someone's help?
Achieving your dreams but ending up alone vs. giving up your dreams but staying close to people you love?
Being able to change the past but losing the present vs. knowing the future but being unable to change the past?
Loving someone you know is bad for you vs. being with someone good but feeling nothing?
A life of learning vs. a life of teaching?
Living for yourself vs. living for others?
Loved by others vs. content within yourself?
Taking a brave risk and failing vs. playing it safe and never trying?
A brief but perfect happiness vs. an ordinary but lasting happiness?
Free but lonely vs. constrained but warm and surrounded?
Being right but staying silent vs. speaking up even if you might be wrong?
A world where no one judges you vs. a world where everyone gives you completely honest feedback?
Living knowing you will die vs. living believing death doesn't exist?
Remembered as someone strong vs. remembered as someone warm?
A life where choices are always free vs. a life where every choice carries consequences?
A life where your true feelings never reach anyone vs. a life where everyone understands you without words?
Being betrayed by someone you trusted vs. you betraying someone?
A stable life without change vs. an uncertain life but one of growth?
Keeping your distance to avoid hurting someone vs. staying close even if you might hurt them?
Everyone knowing your weaknesses vs. no one knowing your strengths?
Blissfully ignorant and happy vs. knowing everything and anxious?
Always being the one who falls in love first vs. always being the one who ends it first?
A life where you feel others' pain vs. a life where you're numb to it?
Learning through repeated mistakes vs. making no mistakes but learning nothing?
Never being able to say what you want vs. saying what you want but never getting it?
Treating everyone equally vs. pouring yourself into the people who matter most?
Losing yourself to preserve a relationship vs. losing a relationship to preserve yourself?
A life where you forgive easily vs. a life where you never really forget?
A life where opening up is easy vs. a life where your heart is hard to reach but well-protected?
Accepting what you cannot change vs. continuing to fight even when you don't want to accept it?
Making every decision alone for life vs. always making decisions with someone else for life?
Being given the chance to live your life over vs. saying no to that chance?
Being remembered as someone respected vs. being remembered as someone loved?
Growing through regret vs. living without it but feeling nothing?
Letting everything go and starting fresh vs. holding onto what you have and carrying on?
A life where you've genuinely hated someone vs. a life where you never have?
